summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a peak‑mid‑70s show highlighted by a smoking Slipknot! and stellar Help > Slip > Franklin’s.
review: The recording is praised as “fantastic”, “crystal clear” and typical high‑quality work from the Betty/Tim team, confirming an excellent soundboard source. Musically the concert is hailed as a peak‑era performance with jazzy Slipknot! runs, a superb Help > Slip > Franklin’s closing sequence, Cosmic Charlie and numerous classic renditions that Deadheads call definitive.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews award five stars and uniformly praise both the performance (standout songs, peak era) and the audio (fantastic, crystal clear), indicating an exceptional show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers repeatedly note a “crystal‑clear”, “fantastic” and “usual high quality” sound, with no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as excellently performed, ending with a jazzy Help>Slip>Franklin's; overall the show is seen as a quintessential mid‑70s peak with tight transitions and high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Phil: Multiple reviewers call Phil’s bass runs a masterclass in effortless walking bass, urging listeners to turn the bass up.
